---
title: "Skill Authority Report"
generated_at: "2026-03-14 17:56:16"
authoritative_root: ".agents/skills"
status: "WORK IN PROGRESS"
---

# Skill Authority Report

> WORK IN PROGRESS: This report includes draft skill authority additions pending final review.

`.agents/skills/` is the authoritative woven-skill registry for Phase 1.
Any `src/skills/local/` surface is transitional and must be classified rather than guessed.

- Authoritative skills: `59`
- Transitional local entries: `8`
- Duplicate definitions: `5`

## Authoritative Registry

### agent-lightning
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/agent-lightning`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/agent-lightning/agent-lightning.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `agent-lightning`

### annex
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/annex`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/annex/scripts/annex.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/annex/annex.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `annex`

### autobot
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/autobot`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/autobot/scripts/autobot.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/autobot/contract.json`
- Runtime Trigger: `autobot`

### build-review-interface
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/build-review-interface`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/build-review-interface/build-review-interface.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `build-review-interface`

### cachebro
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/cachebro`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/cachebro/cachebro.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `cachebro`

### calculus
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/calculus`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/calculus/scripts/calculus.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/calculus/calculus.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `calculus`

### chant
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/chant`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/chant/scripts/chant.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/chant/chant.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `chant`

### chapter
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/chapter`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/chapter/chapter.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `chapter`

### chronicle
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/chronicle`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/chronicle/scripts/chronicle.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/chronicle/SKILL.md`
- Runtime Trigger: `chronicle`

### consciousness
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/consciousness`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/consciousness/scripts/consciousness.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/consciousness/consciousness.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `consciousness`

### corvus-control
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/corvus-control`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/corvus-control/corvus-control.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `corvus-control`

### edda
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/edda`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/edda/scripts/edda.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/edda/edda.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `edda`

### empire
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/empire`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/empire/scripts/empire.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/empire/empire.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `empire`

### engine
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/engine`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/engine/engine.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `engine`

### error-analysis
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/error-analysis`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/error-analysis/error-analysis.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `error-analysis`

### eval-audit
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/eval-audit`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/eval-audit/eval-audit.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `eval-audit`

### evaluate-rag
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/evaluate-rag`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/evaluate-rag/evaluate-rag.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `evaluate-rag`

### evolve
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/evolve`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/evolve/scripts/evolve.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/evolve/contract.json`
- Runtime Trigger: `evolve`

### forge
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/forge`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/forge/scripts/forge.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/forge/forge.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `forge`

### gemini-skills
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/gemini-skills`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/gemini-skills/gemini-skills.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `gemini-skills`

### generate-synthetic-data
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/generate-synthetic-data`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/generate-synthetic-data/generate-synthetic-data.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `generate-synthetic-data`

### gherkin
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/gherkin`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/gherkin/gherkin.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `gherkin`

### hunt
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/hunt`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/hunt/scripts/hunt.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/hunt/hunt.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `hunt`

### jailing
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/jailing`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/jailing/scripts/jailing.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/jailing/jailing.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `jailing`

### linter
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/linter`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/linter/scripts/linter.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/linter/linter.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `linter`

### locks
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/locks`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/locks/scripts/locks.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/locks/locks.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `locks`

### matrix
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/matrix`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/matrix/scripts/matrix.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/matrix/matrix.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `matrix`

### memory
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/memory`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/memory/scripts/memory.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/memory/memory.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `memory`

### metrics
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/metrics`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/metrics/scripts/metrics.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/metrics/metrics.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `metrics`

### mimir
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/mimir`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/mimir/mimir.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `mimir`

### norn
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/norn`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/norn/scripts/norn.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/norn/norn.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `norn`

### odin_ui
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/odin_ui`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/odin_ui/odin_ui.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `odin_ui`

### one-mind
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/one-mind`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/one-mind/scripts/one-mind.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/one-mind/one-mind.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `one-mind`

### oracle
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/oracle`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/oracle/scripts/oracle.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/oracle/oracle.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `oracle`

### persona
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/persona`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/persona/persona.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `persona`

### personas
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/personas`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/personas/scripts/personas.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/personas/personas.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `personas`

### promotion
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/promotion`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/promotion/scripts/promotion.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/promotion/promotion.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `promotion`

### qmd_search
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/qmd_search`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/qmd_search/scripts/qmd_search.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/qmd_search/SKILL.md`
- Runtime Trigger: `qmd_search`

### ravens
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/ravens`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/ravens/scripts/ravens.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/ravens/ravens.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `ravens`

### redactor
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/redactor`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/redactor/scripts/redactor.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/redactor/redactor.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `redactor`

### ref-openomf
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/ref-openomf`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/ref-openomf/SKILL.qmd`
- Runtime Trigger: `ref-openomf`

### report
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/report`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/report/scripts/report.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/report/report.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `report`

### research
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/research`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/research/scripts/research.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/research/SKILL.md`
- Runtime Trigger: `research`

### ritual
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/ritual`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/ritual/scripts/ritual.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/ritual/ritual.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `ritual`

### scan
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/scan`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/scan/scripts/scan.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/scan/scan.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `scan`

### sprt
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/sprt`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/sprt/scripts/sprt.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/sprt/sprt.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `sprt`

### stability
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/stability`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/stability/scripts/stability.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/stability/stability.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `stability`

### sterling
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/sterling`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/sterling/scripts/sterling.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/sterling/sterling.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `sterling`

### style
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/style`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/style/scripts/style.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/style/style.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `style`

### taliesin
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/taliesin`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/taliesin/scripts/taliesin.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/taliesin/taliesin.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `taliesin`

### taste-skill
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/taste-skill`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/taste-skill/taste-skill.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `taste-skill`

### telemetry
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/telemetry`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/telemetry/scripts/telemetry.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/telemetry/telemetry.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `telemetry`

### trace
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/trace`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/trace/scripts/trace.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/trace/trace.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `trace`

### validate-evaluator
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/validate-evaluator`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/validate-evaluator/validate-evaluator.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `validate-evaluator`

### vector
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/vector`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/vector/vector.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `vector`

### visual-explainer
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/visual-explainer`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/visual-explainer/visual-explainer.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `visual-explainer`

### voices
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/voices`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/voices/voices.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `voices`

### warden
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/warden`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/warden/scripts/warden.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/warden/warden.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `warden`

### write-judge-prompt
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/write-judge-prompt`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/write-judge-prompt/write-judge-prompt.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `write-judge-prompt`

## Transitional Local Skills

### dormancy
- Path: `src/skills/local/dormancy.py`
- Migration Status: `bootstrap-only`
- Authority Alias: `none`

### Environment
- Path: `src/skills/local/Environment`
- Migration Status: `retire`
- Authority Alias: `none`

### GitHub
- Path: `src/skills/local/GitHub`
- Migration Status: `retire`
- Authority Alias: `none`

### radon
- Path: `src/skills/local/radon`
- Migration Status: `retire`
- Authority Alias: `none`

### skill-scout
- Path: `src/skills/local/skill-scout`
- Migration Status: `retire`
- Authority Alias: `none`

### VisualExplainer
- Path: `src/skills/local/VisualExplainer`
- Migration Status: `migrate`
- Authority Alias: `none`

### WildHunt
- Path: `src/skills/local/WildHunt`
- Migration Status: `migrate`
- Authority Alias: `none`

### workflow_analyst
- Path: `src/skills/local/workflow_analyst`
- Migration Status: `migrate`
- Authority Alias: `none`

## Duplicate Definitions

- `CacheBro` -> `cachebro`
  Local: `src/skills/local/CacheBro`
  Authority: `.agents/skills/cachebro`
- `KnowledgeHunter` -> `hunt`
  Local: `src/skills/local/KnowledgeHunter`
  Authority: `.agents/skills/hunt`
- `oracle` -> `oracle`
  Local: `src/skills/local/oracle`
  Authority: `.agents/skills/oracle`
- `persona-audit` -> `persona`
  Local: `src/skills/local/persona-audit`
  Authority: `.agents/skills/persona`
- `SkillLearning` -> `evolve`
  Local: `src/skills/local/SkillLearning`
  Authority: `.agents/skills/evolve`
